cards.name: Theoden
cards.quote: The sword is a mighty ally, but it is the heart that must lead the way.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 lc <sprite name="lc"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: NewsFlyToTheMark
cards.quote: Whispers of the world carry heavy tidings on the winds of fate.
cards.actionEffect: Dark tidings travel faster than hope. Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged">; enemy Humans and Dunedain gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Refusing Duels <sprite name="refusingduels">.

cards.name: Ready the Gates
cards.quote: Steel and stone shall hold against the coming storm.
cards.actionEffect: Ready the gates: an owned PC at this hex gains +1 fortification.

cards.name: Ravens
cards.quote: Dark wings span the sky, heralding secrets that tremble upon the earth.
cards.actionEffect: Black wings on the wind, never good news. Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste">; enemy Humans and Dunedain gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> and Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: CounselNoOneWanted
cards.quote: The truth is a bitter draught that weighs heavy on the heart.
cards.actionEffect: Hard truths steady some and undo others. Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Hope <sprite name="hope">; enemies gain Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: Protect the Fords
cards.quote: The river shall not run red with the blood of the innocent.
cards.actionEffect: Hold the crossings; let none pass. Allied units on shore or water-adjacent hexes gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified">; enemy units there are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: Light the Watchfires
cards.quote: In the flickering flames, the unseen dangers reveal themselves.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal as scouted and seen all hexes in radius 2 of each PC you own for 1 turn.

cards.name: HallFellSilent
cards.quote: Silence drapes the hall, a prelude to the storm’s arrival.
cards.actionEffect: A hard truth reveals danger around the hall. Reveal all hexes in radius 2, then one allied Human or Dunedain nearby may immediately reposition 1 step.

cards.name: CaptainOfTheOuterWall
cards.quote: To guard the outer wall is to hold the very heart of our realm.
cards.actionEffect: A wall-captain snaps the defense into motion. Choose one allied Human or Dunedain in radius 2; they may act again this turn.

cards.name: OrdersInTheNight
cards.quote: In shadow, the brave tread where others fear to go.
cards.actionEffect: One trusted soul, one quiet road. Choose 1 allied Human or Dunedain in radius 2; they gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and may move again this turn.

cards.name: HarbourAlreadyWhispering
cards.quote: The docks hum with anticipation, as fate draws near.
cards.actionEffect: Dockside rumor turns to readiness. Reveal the nearest 2 enemy sea or shore threat hexes, and if you are in a PC it gains +2 to +4 loyalty.

cards.name: Black Arrow Men
cards.quote: With arrows black as night, we strike where hope dares to tread.

cards.name: Men Of Bree
cards.quote: We are the watchful eyes and steady hands of the wilds.

cards.name: Rivermen
cards.quote: The river's song guides our oars as we defend our kin.

cards.name: Woodmen
cards.quote: The forest is our home, and we are its fiercest guardians.

cards.name: Woodmen Hunters
cards.quote: Silent as the falling leaf, we stalk our prey.

cards.name: Mangonels
cards.quote: With a great roar, we unleash fate upon our foes.

cards.name: The Carrock
cards.quote: The Carrock rises from the river like a held breath, old as the ford beneath it.

cards.name: Woodmen town
cards.quote: Woodmen town keeps a plain folk-stead’s courage, with smoke, timber, and the watch of the woods about it.

cards.name: Esgaroth
cards.quote: Esgaroth gleams on the water's edge, bright enough to tempt memory and fire alike.

cards.name: Rhovanion
cards.quote: Wide plains stretch beneath sweeping skies, where tales of valor are born.

cards.name: BeornHouse
cards.quote: BeornHouse stands as a stronghold of hearth and stern hospitality, where the bears’ memory is never far.

cards.name: BuhrWidu
cards.quote: BuhrWidu shelters its people beneath the wood, where the trees are old enough to judge strangers.

cards.name: Dale
cards.quote: Dale keeps the memory of the Long Lake and the mountain road, bright with trade and hard with loss.

cards.name: Framsburg
cards.quote: Framsburg keeps a stern watch over the river-country, as if Fram’s old strength had never loosened its grip.

cards.name: Maethelburg
cards.quote: Maethelburg holds its river crossing like a clasp of iron, small but unwilling to break.

cards.name: Rohan
cards.quote: The land of horse-lords sings with the echoes of galloping hooves.

cards.name: Edoras
cards.quote: Edoras keeps its golden roofs against the sky, and the wind there still remembers riders.

cards.name: Derndingle
cards.quote: Derndingle shelters the ancient wood with a silence that feels almost vowed.

cards.name: Dunharrow
cards.quote: Dunharrow lies in the mountains like a grave that has chosen to stand upright.

cards.name: Eastfold
cards.quote: Eastfold lies open to wind and horse-track, and its fields remember riders before plowmen.

cards.name: HelmDeep
cards.quote: HelmDeep bears the mark of war, yet its walls still answer with iron courage.

cards.name: WestFold
cards.quote: WestFold opens to the plains with a stubborn calm that no storm has taught to bow.

cards.name: GapOfRohan
cards.quote: A narrow pass where courage meets the mountains' might.

cards.name: Bard
cards.quote: Bard's arrow and steadfast hand saved a city in need.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 ar <sprite name="ar"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Beoraborn
cards.quote: Beoraborn has the North's stubborn blood in him.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 10 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Beorn
cards.quote: Beorn keeps the wild edge between fear and shelter.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Hama
cards.quote: Hama stands at the door as if the hall were his charge.
cards.actionEffect: Upgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Grimbeorn
cards.quote: Grimbeorn guards the wild border with a bear's patience.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 hi <sprite name="hi"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Fram Wyrmslayer
cards.quote: Fram Wyrmslayer keeps the memory of dragon-fire in his name.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Voteli
cards.quote: Voteli has looked on darkness and not bowed.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Bork
cards.quote: Bork has the look of one who bought his lesson dear.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 10 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Ingomer
cards.quote: Ingomer rides as one who knows the cost of haste.
cards.actionEffect: Increase loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 10 on a random controlled settlement.

cards.name: Ill News Before Dawn
cards.quote: He comes before daybreak with hard eyes and harder counsel, and sleep ends where his warning falls.
cards.actionEffect: Ill news comes before the sun. Reveal the nearest enemy PC or army in radius 5; if a PC, it loses 10 loyalty; if an army, it is exposed to your scouts.

cards.name: Riders Sent in Haste
cards.quote: There is no time for a full muster; only enough for the right man to be already on the road.
cards.actionEffect: Move the current character to the farthest owned PC, and that PC gains 5 loyalty.

cards.name: Council in a Shuttered Hall
cards.quote: The windows are barred, the torches low, and every choice sounds heavier in the dark.
cards.actionEffect: In secret rooms, the future is sometimes chosen. Look at the top 3 cards of your deck; put 1 into your hand; if an enemy is within radius 2 of your PC, it gains 5 loyalty.

cards.name: Wardens Of Annuminas
cards.quote: The wardens of Annuminas keep watch over a dead crown.

cards.name: Beast Of The Woods
cards.quote: The beast of the wood moves where no road is safe.

cards.name: Riders Of Rohan
cards.quote: The thunder of our horses shall echo in victory.

cards.name: AriseRidersOfTheoden
cards.quote: At Theoden's call, riders are awakened from grief.
cards.actionEffect: Allied cavalry <sprite name="ca"> units in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Nindalf
cards.quote: In the quiet valley, the river sings a timeless song.

cards.name: SouthernMirkwood
cards.quote: South Mirkwood is old with trails, fumes, and the patient watch of hidden things.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: Weathertop remembers moonlight, blade, and the long ache of old days.

cards.name: Annuminas
cards.quote: The stones of Annuminas wait in silence for the hand that shall wake them.

cards.name: Bree
cards.quote: Bree keeps faith with the road, though the years grow wary.

cards.name: CarasCelairnen
cards.quote: Beneath its boughs, Caras Celairnen keeps memory bright and still.

cards.name: Eagle's Eyrie
cards.quote: High on the eyrie the Eagles keep a lonely watch.

cards.name: FornostErain
cards.quote: Fornost lies like a fallen crown upon the North.

cards.name: Lake Town Arsenal
cards.quote: Lake-town stores iron as a poor folk store hope.
cards.actionEffect: Gain +1 <sprite name="iron">, +1 <sprite name="steel">, and +1 <sprite name="timber">.

cards.name: The Beorning Toll
cards.quote: At the Beorning toll, all travelers pay in coin or courtesy.
cards.actionEffect: Fortify the caster for 1 turn and halt enemy units in the same or adjacent hexes.

cards.name: Joining the Rangers
cards.quote: To join the Rangers is to take the long road and the long watch.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Dunedain in radius 2 gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn), and the caster scouts radius 2.

cards.name: On the Pelennor
cards.quote: Upon the Pelennor the horn is answered by valor.
cards.actionEffect: The fields ring with hooves and steel. Target allied army commander here gains Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (2); cavalry <sprite name="ca"> also gains Haste <sprite name="haste">.

cards.name: Heir to Barahir
cards.quote: The heir of Barahir bears a line that the years could not break.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Humans/Dunedain in radius 1 gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (1 turn); caster gains Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turn).

cards.name: TheAwakeningOfTheoden
cards.quote: When Theoden awakes, the courage of Rohan wakes with him.
cards.actionEffect: The king returns to himself, and the shadow falls away. Target allied character permanently gains +1 <sprite name="commander">, loses Fear <sprite name="fear">, and gains Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (2).

cards.name: Northmen Stand Firm
cards.quote: The Northmen stand as weathered timber in the storm.
cards.actionEffect: The men of the North do not break. Target allied Human or Dunedain wins any forced duel this turn and refuses further duels; the nearest allied PC gains +5 loyalty.

cards.name: Oath of the Westfold
cards.quote: The Westfold keeps its oath when the reckoning comes.
cards.actionEffect: Humans and Dunedain in radius 3 gain Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> and Hope <sprite name="hope">.

cards.name: Paths of the Dead
cards.quote: The Paths of the Dead still feel the chill of unbreathed oaths, and no cheer lingers there.

cards.name: Sarn Lothduin
cards.quote: Sarn Lothduin lies by the water like a watching stone, patient and unadorned.

cards.name: Eomer
cards.quote: I will not let a shadow fall upon Rohan while I draw breath.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 lc <sprite name="lc"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Eowyn
cards.quote: I am no man; I will stand against the darkness.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Dorwinion
cards.quote: A realm of lush vineyards and fine wines, where joy and celebration reign.

cards.name: Stormcrow
cards.quote: They call me ill-omened. Let them. A stormcrow carries truer counsel than those who wait for calm skies.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.quote: Adorned in finery, our spirits lift with the promise of gold.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: Dorwinion Mariners
cards.quote: With the wind at our backs, we sail towards glory.

cards.name: Dorwinion Riders
cards.quote: Swift as the river, fierce as the lion, we ride forth.

cards.name: Anduin
cards.quote: The Great River carries the memory of all kingdoms.

cards.name: Cardolan
cards.quote: Cardolan keeps old roads under the grass.

cards.name: TheNorthDowns
cards.quote: The North Downs stand as old sentinels over the road.

cards.name: Arthedain
cards.quote: Arthedain remembers its kings in the wind.

cards.name: MistyMountains
cards.quote: The Misty Mountains hold their teeth against all who pass.

cards.name: SouthernGondor
cards.quote: The sun sets over golden fields, a land of dreams.

cards.name: Forochel
cards.quote: Under the hard sky of Forochel, even silence has a stern voice.

cards.name: Bay of Forochel
cards.quote: Frozen waters cradle the restless spirits of the North.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green of Hobbiton seems soft, yet it has a watchful heart.

cards.name: TheShire
cards.quote: The Shire endures by patience and many watchful hands.

cards.name: FirstLightOnTheThirdDay
cards.quote: On the third day, the first light is the sweetest.
cards.actionEffect: They came at dawn on the third day. Humans and Dunedain encouraged and hopeful; cavalry gain Haste. Own mages slowed by the light. DS emissaries gain Arcane Insight. DS in open despaired; FP armies +8%; DS armies -12%. Adds Encouraged and Hope <sprite name="hope"> to all Human and Dunedain units in radius 3.

cards.name: Light Through Cloud
cards.quote: A clear thought and a clean light may scatter a whole host of lesser shadows.
cards.actionEffect: All allied units gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> and lose Fear <sprite name="fear">; all enemies are Halted <sprite name="halted"> for 1 turn.
